name: Baked Ziti Al Telefono
recipeIngredient: 1 Pound fresh mozzarella, in 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Bring 6 quarts water to boil and add 2 tablespoons salt.
3. Cook ziti according to package instructions until al dente. Remove, drain and refresh in cold water. Drain again and place in a large mixing bowl.
4. Add tomato sauce, balsamic vinegar, mozzarella and grated cheese to the pasta and stir well to mix.
5. Divide the mixture among 4 gratin dishes and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
6. Bake in oven for about 20 minutes until bubbling and crusty on top.
7. Remove from oven and serve immediately.
Yield: 4 servings
